                            _ = (|f (a + x)| + |f (a - x)|) ^ 2 := by ring
                        _ ≤ (1 + 1) ^ 2 := by

                            (try norm_num) <;>
                              (try linarith [h₂ (a + x), h₂ (a - x)]) <;>
                                (try simp_all [abs_le]) <;>
                                  (try nlinarith)

                        have h₃₃ : (g x) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by
                          nlinarith [sq_nonneg (g x)]
                        exact h₃₃
                      · have h₃₁ : (2 * f a * g x) ^ 2 ≤ 4 := h₂₈
                        have h₃₂ : 0 < (f a) ^ 2 := by

            exact h₂₂

              have h₂₈ : (f 0) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by

                have h₃₀ : (f 0) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := by

      have h₈ : (g x) ^ 2 ≤ 1 := h₇

        have h₁₀ : -1 ≤ g x := by

        have h
